description.en: Analyze the sample text (presumed to be in CSV format) and return True if the first row appears to be a series of column headers. Inspecting each column, one of two key criteria will be considered to estimate if the sample contains a header: the second through n-th rows contain numeric values the second through n-th rows contain strings where at least one value’s length differs from that of the putative header of that column. Twenty-one rows after the header are sampled; if more than half of ...
